holdings.infoBox: CSEN is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are ConocoPhillips stock at 7.62%, ExxonMobil Holdings at 7.07%, Suncor Energy at 6.09%, Valero Energy at 4.67%, and Cenovus Energy at 4.33%.

overview.description: The Cohen & Steers Future of Energy Active ETF (CSEN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund is an actively managed, high-conviction approach to investing in energy companies across the full value chain. The ETF that contains exposure to both traditional and alternative energy companies. CSEN was launched on Jun 12, 2026 and is issued by Cohen & Steers.
